backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the school inventory and billing backend with functions to add/update items, create bills (with automatic stock deduction), and query inventory, bills by date, and daily totals.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — authentication guard rewrite in App.tsx and Add Item form rewrite in Inventory.tsx — to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key behavior of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to the school's stock and inventory management system and mounting the app via the /src/main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app configuring TanStack Router with auth guard components (AuthGuard, LoginGuard, IndexRedirect) that synchronously check a localStorage session flag on every render to protect Dashboard, Inventory, Billing, and Reports routes, wrapping everything in React Query and a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BillLineItem.tsx: Single billing line item UI component with an item selector dropdown, quantity input, unit price display, subtotal calculation, stock validation error display, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/EditItemModal.ts: A modal dialog for editing an existing inventory item's name, category, quantity, and price, using the useUpdateItem mutation with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/InventoryTable.t: Renders a table of inventory items with quantity color-coding for low/zero stock, and Edit and Add Stock action buttons per row.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell with a collapsible sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Inventory, Billing, Reports, Logout) and a top header, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/Login.tsx: Login page with username/password form that calls the useAuth login hook and redirects to the dashboard on success, showing inline error alerts on failure.
frontend/src/components/PrintableBill.ts: A print-only receipt component displaying student name, payment mode, itemized bill rows, and grand total formatted in INR, hidden from the screen view.
frontend/src/components/RemainingStockTa: Displays a read-only table of inventory items showing their remaining stock quantities with color indicators for zero or low stock.
frontend/src/components/ReportSummary.ts: Shows three summary stat cards for Grand Total, Total Units Sold, and Total Income using icon badges and INR-formatted values.
frontend/src/components/SalesTable.tsx: Renders a table of sales report rows with item name, quantity sold, and amount earned in INR, with an empty-state message when no records exist.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a summary metric with a title, value, icon, and optional subtitle, including a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStockModal: A modal dialog that allows users to add additional stock quantity to an existing inventory item, updating it via the useUpdateItem mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: A simple session-based authentication hook that validates hardcoded credentials and stores the session state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching/adding/updating inventory items, creating bills, fetching bills by date, and retrieving dashboard totals.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including brand, semantic, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/src/lib/constants.ts: Exports a static list of inventory category names used across the application.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a cn utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: A billing page where users can select inventory items, specify quantities, choose a payment mode, and submit a bill for a student, with a printable bill preview on success.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that displays four summary cards (total items, stock available, stock sold today, income today) fetched from the backend, plus a quick-guide section with numbered steps.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory page with a controlled form to add new items (name, category, quantity, price) with per-field validation, and renders an InventoryTable with Edit and UpdateStock modals.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page that lets the user pick a date, then aggregates bill data into sales rows and summary totals, rendering ReportSummary, SalesTable, and RemainingStockTable components.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (brand, emerald, amber, rose, sidebar, etc.), border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 11) describing the Stock & Inventory Management System's features, architecture notes, and known issues including broken login guard, billing flow, and inventory add-item functionality.
